task: Insurance policy renewal (clone-forward). POST /api/v1/insurance/policies/:id/renew clones the source policy (tenant_id, insurer_name, vendor_id, coverage_type/id, due_day, pay_day, late_fee_pct, insurer_email, agent_contact) plus all policy_unit children (asset_id + insured_value_cents); resets the term fields (policy_number, effective_date, expiry_date, total_premium_cents, down_payment_cents, installment_count) from the request body; stamps renewed_from_policy_id to the source policy id; and regenerates the premium bill schedule via createPolicyBillSchedule() inside the SAME transaction (atomic all-or-nothing — schedule failure rolls the renewal back and returns 502). Idempotency is inherited: the route matches the existing /api/v1/insurance/policies(/|$) REQUIRED_MATCHERS, so an Idempotency-Key is required and retries replay the cached response. Additive-only.
financial_rule: Bills are created/voided ONLY via createBill()/voidBill() from apps/backend/src/accounting/bills.service.ts (reused through createPolicyBillSchedule from Block 5). No new financial ledger code.
